legacy.question: What is the total sales revenue by product category?
legacy.sql:
SELECT
    p.category,
    SUM(s.total_revenue) AS total_sales_revenue
FROM TS.sales s
INNER JOIN TS.product_master p
    ON s.product_id = p.product_id
GROUP BY p.category
ORDER BY total_sales_revenue DESC;
legacy.answer:
category total_sales_revenue
           Electronics   $1,531,922,624.38
              Clothing     $210,406,440.46
        Home & Kitchen     $176,376,205.19
Beauty & Personal Care       $4,747,819.24

legacy.question: Show me total sales revenue by year.
legacy.sql:
SELECT
    YEAR(sale_date) AS sale_year,
    SUM(total_revenue) AS total_sales_revenue
FROM TS.sales
GROUP BY YEAR(sale_date)
ORDER BY sale_year;

legacy.question: Which store had the highest total sales revenue? Just give me the top one.
legacy.sql:
SELECT TOP 1
    l.store_id,
    l.store_name,
    SUM(s.total_revenue) AS total_sales_revenue
FROM TS.sales s
INNER JOIN TS.location_master l ON s.store_id = l.store_id
GROUP BY l.store_id, l.store_name
ORDER BY SUM(s.total_revenue) DESC;
legacy.answer:
store_id    store_name total_sales_revenue
    S003 Central Plaza     $255,317,634.14

legacy.question: Did the Downtown Flagship store generate more revenue than the Westside Mall store?
legacy.sql:
SELECT
    l.store_name,
    SUM(s.total_revenue) AS total_sales_revenue
FROM TS.sales s
INNER JOIN TS.location_master l
    ON s.store_id = l.store_id
WHERE l.store_name IN ('Downtown Flagship', 'Westside Mall')
GROUP BY l.store_name
ORDER BY total_sales_revenue DESC;
legacy.answer: Yes. The Downtown Flagship store generated more revenue than the Westside Mall store. Downtown Flagship generated $108,520,727.51 in total sales revenue, while Westside Mall generated $96,119,212.14.

    ON s.store_id = lm.store_id

legacy.question: Which store has the highest average daily foot traffic?
legacy.sql:
SELECT TOP 1
    st.store_id,
    lm.store_name,
    AVG(CAST(st.foot_traffic_count AS FLOAT)) AS avg_daily_foot_traffic
FROM TS.store_traffic st
INNER JOIN TS.location_master lm
    ON st.store_id = lm.store_id
GROUP BY st.store_id, lm.store_name
ORDER BY avg_daily_foot_traffic DESC;
legacy.answer:
store_id     store_name  avg_daily_foot_traffic
    S008 Uptown Gallery                     630

agentic.question: Which store has the highest average daily foot traffic?
agentic.sql:
SELECT TOP 1 st.store_id,
       lm.store_name,
       AVG(CAST(st.foot_traffic_count AS FLOAT)) AS avg_daily_foot_traffic
FROM TS.store_traffic st
LEFT JOIN TS.location_master lm
    ON st.store_id = lm.store_id
GROUP BY st.store_id, lm.store_name
ORDER BY avg_daily_foot_traffic DESC;
agentic.answer: The store with the highest average daily foot traffic is S008 — Uptown Gallery, with an average of 630.32 visitors per day.

agentic.question: Which employee made the most sales by revenue?
agentic.sql:
SELECT TOP 1 e.employee_id, e.employee_name, SUM(s.total_revenue) AS total_sales_revenue
FROM TS.sales s
INNER JOIN TS.employee_data e ON s.employee_id = e.employee_id
GROUP BY e.employee_id, e.employee_name
ORDER BY total_sales_revenue DESC;
agentic.answer: The employee with the highest sales revenue is William Sanchez (Employee ID: E0022), with total sales revenue of approximately $44.16 million.
